name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Grease a 10-inch tube pan.
3. In a bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In another bowl, beat butter and sugar until fluffy. Add vanilla extract.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Blend in sour cream.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture.
8. Pour 1/3 of the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Mix together cinnamon, brown sugar, and pecans. Sprinkle over the batter.
10. Pour half of the remaining batter over the nut mixture.
11. Repeat with the remaining batter and nut mixture.
12. Mix the vanilla extract and water. Pour over the top of the batter.
13. Bake for 60-70 minutes until the top springs back when touched.
14. Let cool for 10 minutes before removing from pan and serving on a plate.
15. Dust with confectioners' sugar, if desired.
